title: Robata-Style Turkish Dill Pickles Grilled Chicken
description: Rich, bouncy, and full of flavor, this Turkish dish features dill pickles and grilled chicken served in a bamboo tray. Perfect for a low-carb friendly brunch or snack.
instructions: Preheat the robata grill to medium-high heat.
Slice the chicken breast into 1-inch pieces and season with salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Grill the chicken pieces for 5-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, grill the dill pickle slices for 2-3 minutes per side, or until slightly charred and tender.
In a small bowl, mix together minced garlic and olive oil.
Brush the garlic-oil mixture onto the grilled chicken and pickles.
Slice the grilled chicken and pickles into bite-sized pieces and serve in a bamboo tray with a dollop of yogurt, if desired.
Garnish with chopped fresh dill and serve immediately.
Note: this recipe is for refrigerator pickling/preserving only — store in the refrigerator and consume within 1 week. Do not water-bath can without an acid (vinegar or lemon juice).
